north_star.current: Build CASEVOICE into a safe local-first command center that can read evidence, understand current project state, route work to Team Members, and keep all execution behind explicit approval gates.
immediate_priority_order: Startup Lock and CRM connection integrity
Mini-Brain v1 local read-only truth layer
Team Member Queue autonomy from grounded context
Company Health / ER Monitor truth-only hardening
Conference / Meeting workflow that turns founder intent into scoped work packets
Drive Brain evidence retrieval before answering
Approval-to-execution only after guardrails are ready
parked_for_now: App.tsx navigation changes unless explicitly approved

protected_rules.app_tsx: src/App.tsx is protected and must not be changed unless explicitly approved.
protected_rules.health_boundary: Health reports system truth only. No interpretation or decision logic.
protected_rules.write_boundary: No DB writes, Drive writes/deletes, GitHub writes, email sends, or Team Member execution without explicit approval.
protected_rules.checkpoint_rule: Create and verify a checkpoint before significant changes.

team_member_boundaries.safe_next_team_member_goal: Use Mini-Brain truth to generate grounded screen-only Team Member discussion or queue draft previews before any execution or write path is connected.

next_safe_action.after_mini_brain_v1: Consume Mini-Brain from the safest existing room without touching App.tsx, then use it to ground Team Member discussion/work packets.
do_not_do_next: Do not polish connector receipts before Team Member / Mini-Brain work.
Do not write to database, Drive, GitHub, or email.
